## GOOGL+OR+Alphabet+OR+Google Google News, from 2026-02-13 to 2026-02-20:

### A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music (source: blog.google) 

blog.googleA new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create musicLyria 3 is now available in the Gemini app. Create custom, high-quality 30-second tracks from text and images..2 days ago

AT&T NewsroomAT&T Offers Deep Savings on the New Google Pixel 10aCustomers can pre-order the new Google Pixel 10a on att.com, myAT&T app, and in-stores starting Feb. 18, with general availability on March 5..2 days ago
